biography: Born in May 2002, Lydia Page is a Midlands-based actor; who grew up in Leicestershire, England. Lydia has been a training member of Nottingham Television Workshop since 2017. They are best known for playing Mildred Hubble in Series 4 of CBBC's The Worst Witch (2020),  Primrose Larkin in ITV comedy adaptation The Larkins (2021) and Siobhan in Blue Jean (2022).
name: Lydia Page
